Subject: Re: ports recently submitted.


On that note. gtkgl should be dependent on graphics/Mesa3 then.

On Wed, 12 Aug 1998, Matthew Hunt wrote:

> On Wed, Aug 12, 1998 at 06:51:48PM -0400, Bill Fumerola wrote:
> 
> > the ports are mesa and gtkgl.
> 
> Mesa is already in the Ports Collection; see graphics/Mesa2
> and Mesa3.
> 
> May I close that PR?
> 
> --
